---
name: New Shader Effect
about: Propose or submit a new shader effect
title: '[Shader] '
labels: shader, enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Shader Name

Name of the effect.

## Description

What does this shader do visually?

## Category

- [ ] Animated (uses time/motion)
- [ ] Style (static visual effect)
- [ ] Retro (pixel art, vintage, etc.)

## Parameters

List the user-controllable parameters:
- `u_param1` — Description (range: 0–1, default: 0.5)
- `u_param2` — Description (range: 0–10, default: 3)

## GLSL Code (if available)

```glsl
// Paste your fragment shader code here
```

## Visual Reference

Screenshots or links showing what the effect should look like.
